content: agent2 here: implementing 'Add Nested Context Validation to Prevent Resource Leaks' - adding validate_nesting param to Context in src/click/core.py, plus updates to src/click/shell_completion.py (_resolve_context etc). Will touch core.py Context.__init__, close(), __exit__, _make_sub_context. Let me know if you're touching these too.

Heads up: I've already edited src/click/shell_completion.py's _resolve_context (added validate_nesting=False to the 3 make_context calls + ctx_args). Also edited src/click/core.py (Context.__init__, close(), _make_sub_context) for validate_nesting support. If you wrap those same make_context calls in 'with' statements, please edit around my validate_nesting=False kwargs rather than reverting them - should be a straightforward merge since our changes are orthogonal (your 'with' wrapping vs my new kwarg args).
